name: Onion-Stuffed Acorn Squash
recipeIngredient: 1 Package frozen tiny onions in cream sauce (10 oz.)
1 Cup soft bread crumbs (1 1/4 slices of bread)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the acorn squash in half lengthwise and remove seeds.
2. Place the cut side down in a shallow baking pan.
3. Bake in a preheated 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) oven for 35 to 40 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, cook the onions according to package directions.
5. Stir in the melted cheese until combined.
6. Turn the squash cut side up and sprinkle with a little salt.
7. Spoon the onion-cheese mixture into the squash halves.
8. Combine the bread crumbs and parsley; toss with the melted butter.
9. Sprinkle this topping over the onions.
10. Bake for 15 to 20 more minutes.
Serves 4.
